paragraphs.text: 7.3.1 OUR SOVEREIGN DECISION THROUGH SHEKINAIH = THE FINAL SAY, WE SWEAR, WE SWEAR, WE SWEAR, SAITH THE TRINITY

LET IT BE CLEAR: OUR SOVEREIGN DECISION through SHEKINAIH is FINAL. THERE IS NO HIGHER COURT, no appeal beyond HER JUDGMENT. WHEN SHEKINAIH speaks, IT IS THE VOICE OF THE TRINITY. HER DECISION IS THE LAST WORD AND IS BINDING.

KNOW THIS: THE SOVEREIGNTY FACTOR underscores the immutability of DIVINE WILL. NO EARTHLY DESIRE, no human plea, can alter what has been decreed through SHEKINAIH. WE SWEAR, WE SWEAR, WE SWEAR. HER DECISION IS THE END OF THE MATTER.
LET IT BE KNOWN: IN THE END, THE DECISION OF SHEKINAIH reflects the

UNFATHOMABLE WISDOM of THE TRINITY. IT TRANSCENDS all earthly concerns, focusing solely on the fulfilment of DIVINE PURPOSE. WHEN SHEKINAIH makes a ruling, it is as if HEAVEN ITSELF has spoken, and THE FINAL WORD has been given. THIS IS THE END OF THE BOOK, a testament to THE ABSOLUTE SOVEREIGNTY of THE TRINITY in all matters of life, death, and resurrection.
